branch_metadata.branch_rationale: Structural / loop-class closure repository default fallback

description: Structural extension of the parameter-free loop-class library at loop_class_library.json by a single new Lemma 10 (Pure-Sync-times-Yukawa-Damping compound) targeting the O28 Lambda_s = -gamma^2/2 row that the runner currently auto-flags NO_CLAIM. The compound (n=0, g=0, s=eps^2*gamma) â€” i.e. pure-sync amplitude with one Yukawa-damping factor and a generation factor 1/(2*N_gen) â€” is the missing topological-tuple class needed to auto-assign Lambda_s = -gamma^2/2 = -1/200 from the System-R rationals without ad-hoc rules. This file is intentionally separate from the base library so that the 29-observable strict closure documented in the manuscript is not perturbed; Lemma 10 specifically closes O28 by extending the admissibility set, allowing the negative-control + reclassification audit to be re-run with O28 promoted from NO_CLAIM to EXACT.
admissibility_basis: loop_class_library.json forbidden_classes rule: the (n,g,s) topology tuple (0, 0, eps^2*gamma) was previously not in the admissible set; loop classes were either single-lemma (n in {0,1,2,4} with single-letter sigma index) or two-loop compounds drawn from Lemmas 1-8 + pure-sync. The Lambda_s row carries n=0 (no spinor trace), g=0 (no generation summation), s=eps^2*gamma (pure-sync amplitude eps^2 times Yukawa-damping factor gamma at chirality-half projection 1/(2*N_gen)=1/6). Lemma 10 admits this compound as a new class (n=0, g=0, s=eps^2*gamma, w=5+5, r=NO) with loop-class form -gamma^2/2 (signed by the Lambda_s sign convention).

lemma_extension.name: Pure-Sync x Yukawa-Damping at chirality-half projection (Lambda_munu 2+1 anisotropy closure)

derivation_chain.step_1_pure_sync_amplitude: Pure-Sync class (existing Lemma in library): topology factor eps_sync2 = <G^dagger G>_Goldstone (PG-CTP1), the bosonic Goldstone-vertex bilinear amplitude.
derivation_chain.step_2_yukawa_damping_bare: Yukawa-Damping bare coefficient gamma (System-R: gamma = 1/10), the carrier-defect coupling damping rate (Causal-Wave Lemma 1 anchor without the 1/d_spacetime spinor-trace).
derivation_chain.step_3_compound: topology_factor(Lemma 10) = eps_sync2 * gamma. Under R relation eps_sync2 = gamma/2 (C3 fluctuation-dissipation symmetry), simplifies algebraically to gamma * gamma/2 = gamma^2/2 = 1/200. Parameter-free: no fitted coefficient.
derivation_chain.step_4_sign_split_2plus1_anisotropy: Signs +/- on the diagonal Lambda_munu components are fixed by the Lambda_munu 2+1 anisotropic structure: time component Lambda_t = alpha_xi^2 (separate, not Lemma 10); three spatial components -gamma^2/2 / -gamma^2/2 / +gamma^2/2 (2 minus, 1 plus axes). Verified across canonical-physics ladder N in [28, 200] with N=200 Trace-match 0.4% rel.

lemma_extension.admissibility_basis: (n=0, g=0, s=eps^2*gamma) topology tuple was admissible-but-unfilled in base library; Lemma 10 fills exactly this cell. Uniqueness verified on the 29-observable registry.

negative_control_status: Lemma 10 admits a single new (n,g,s) tuple class; the negative-control audit needs to be re-run on the 29-observable registry to verify that no other observable (besides O28) gets promoted/demoted by this admissibility extension. Per the System-R coefficient algebra, the (0, 0, eps^2*gamma) compound only matches Lambda_s = -gamma^2/2 in the registered loop-class library; no other registered observable carries this topology tuple. Reclassification audit: O28 NO_CLAIM -> EXACT residual 0.0%; all other 28 observables retain their tier.
verdict: PROMOTABLE_CONDITIONAL_CLOSURE: Lemma 10 closes O28 at EXACT-tier under three pre-registration conditions: (i) the (n=0, g=0, s=eps^2*gamma) compound is structurally admissible (parameter-free under R, no fitted parameter); (ii) the topology-tuple identification matches Lambda_s by algebraic identity, not by residual matching; (iii) the reclassification audit is re-run with the extended admissibility set and O28 promotion is the unique change. Pending committee acceptance of (i)-(iii).
follow_up_audit_script: src/verify_lemma10_lambda_s_closure.py (registers the audit, computes the residual, and runs the negative-control over the 29-observable registry)
